metric_name: Adoption path into SOA for midmarket
metric_value: Automated/semi-automated conversion of common tasks (API, user screens, message replacements) is a practical on-ramp (attributed Kastner quote on slide 2)
notes: Kastner quote used as LANSA marketing endorsement

metric_value: Web services technology promises flexible integration across internal apps and external partners; many firms stand to benefit
SOA has captured public attention; has huge growth potential; is not a one-size-fits-all solution
Process orchestration incl. FTP, HTTP, email, flat-file, data-transformation, J2EE/ESB/MQ connectors; System i focus
Governance + Process + Messaging/Transport + Connectors, with ESB and J2EE as standards
SOA largely superseded by microservices, REST, and iPaaS. Core automation claim (auto-conversion of APIs/screens/messages) validated by modern low-code/RPA/iPaaS
notes: Kastner directional claim validated; SOA framing dated

metric_value: LANSA acquired by Idera, Inc. in 2021
